author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to' Reveals Additional Cast, Staff, Theme Song, First Trailer
The official website for the anime movie adaptation of Kaori Mado and Akamoku's Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to (You, Fireworks, and Our Promise) light novel revealed additional cast, staff, the theme song, a key visual (pictured), and the first trailer on Tuesday. The movie is scheduled to premiere in Japanese theatres on July 17. Voice actresses Rie Takahashi (Kanojo, Okarishimasu) and Natsuko Yokosawa (Bokura no Yoake) are joining the cast as Haru and Yukari Natsume, respectively. Staff Ar...
